message:
fix(vef): prevent hash collision in constraint_compiler compute_policy_hash

The SERIALIZATION_FAILED sentinel string was returned directly without
passing through SHA-256, creating a hash collision risk where two
different policies that both fail serialization would produce identical
"hashes" and pass verify_snapshot_hash ct_eq comparison.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
